validate.message: Workflow DevKit requires AI Gateway OIDC setup — ensure vercel link + vercel env pull for VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN

validate.upgradeWhy: Guides migration from context.run() to the "use step" directive for durable, retryable workflow steps.

validate.message: require() is not available in workflow sandbox scope — use ESM imports and move Node.js logic into "use step" functions

validate.upgradeWhy: Guides migration from createWorkflow() function API to the "use workflow" directive pattern.

validate.message: Singular cacheHandler is deprecated in Next.js 16 — use cacheHandlers (plural) with per-type handlers

validate.message: useRef() requires an initial value in React 19 — use useRef(null) or useRef(0)

searchParams is async in Next.js 16 — add await: const { query } = await searchParams
